column1: # F-09 permanent C stubs — language limitation C glue (G-04 STRICT allowed)
# These files CANNOT be migrated to .x until language features are added:
# G-04 STRICT mode: passes when all remaining .c are in this file.
# G-02d: backend dispatch/enc (9 files, inline asm / struct literal / function pointer arrays)
# G-02d: runtime OS/platform stubs (17 files, POSIX syscalls / #if / weak / argv)
# G-02d: parser/link alias (5 files, weak / C ABI bridge)
# G-02d: pipeline alias/bridge (13 files, C ABI bridge / weak)
# G-02d: root stubs/bridge (12 files, weak / C ABI bridge / va_list / POSIX)
# G-02d: parser_asm_*_slice.c (21 files, #include pattern with include guard)
# G-04: platform #if conditional compilation (16 files, POSIX syscalls / #if / build mode switches)
# G-04: C frontend AST companion (5 files, depend on C ASTExpr/ASTBlock/ASTFunc struct layout)
# G-04: 6 remaining simple ABI / libc bridges (2026-07-10 STRICT close)
# - string_fast / heap_*: libc mem* / malloc / posix_memalign thin wrappers (P0b extern "C" 自举后可再评估迁 .x)
# - std_runtime_fast: panic/abort 符号别名 → shux_panic_
# - lsp_codegen_extern: 大块 C 源字符串 + strstr 路径探测（codegen -E preamble）
# - lsp_heap_bootstrap: 冷启动无 std/heap.o 时 malloc 桥
# - preprocess_if_stack_bridge: 分 TU 链静态 #if 栈（pipeline_gen2 不链 glue 时）
